notes: Submission contents: 1) Low-level Go2 locomotion checkpoint is in low_level_checkpoint/. 2) High-level planner code is track_bonus/planner.py. 3) High-level planner config is configs/starter_planner.json. 4) No separate high-level learned weights/checkpoint are used; the high-level planner is hand-tuned. 5) Evaluation result should be in artifacts/track_eval/results.json when reproduced locally. Best observed full no-render eval completed 200 m in about 150.10 s with no fall and no boundary violation. To reproduce, run run_track_bonus.py with --checkpoint-dir low_level_checkpoint --planner-config configs/starter_planner.json --config configs/colab_runtime_config.json.
